sub_modules.fp_add_unpack: Unpacks IEEE-754 operands into sign, effective exponent, extended significand, and special-case flags.
sub_modules.fp_add_align: Selects the larger magnitude operand, aligns the smaller significand using sticky-bit right shift, and forwards operand signs.
sub_modules.fp_add_execute: Performs signed significand addition or subtraction and produces an unnormalized magnitude.
sub_modules.fp_add_normalize: Normalizes the raw significand result and adjusts the exponent while preserving guard, round, and sticky bits.
sub_modules.fp_add_round_pack: Applies round-to-nearest-even, handles NaN/INF/zero edge cases, detects overflow and underflow, and packs the IEEE-754 result.
